title: tabp settings
description: Optional recruiter-facing configuration file at <project>/tabp settings.json. All fields optional with documented defaults. No secrets. No workspace_path.

screening_model.description: Model for per-CV screening subagents. Default: coordinator default Sonnet model.

synthesis_model.description: Model for the synthesis subagent. Default: coordinator default Opus model.

cv_folder.description: Relative path to CV folder from project folder. Default: ./cvs.

jd_folder.description: Relative path to JD folder from project folder. Default: ./jds.

state_write_mode.description: How state is written. helper = tabp_helper.py; instructed = coordinator writes directly (degraded mode). Default: helper.
